summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Beauty Booking app. Fixed critical frontend Select component bug and Turnstile integration issue. Backend APIs working for public endpoints, authentication blocked by Turnstile verification requirements.

critical_bugs.issue: Turnstile verification failing with test tokens
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all user registration and authentication flows
critical_bugs.details: Backend returns 400 'Bot verification failed' even with Cloudflare test tokens

critical_bugs.issue: Turnstile verification failing with test tokens
critical_bugs.details: Same Turnstile verification issue as client registration

✅ Working - Returns empty array (no stylists registered)

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Select.Item with empty string value causing runtime errors
ui_bugs.details: Changed empty string value to 'all' and updated logic accordingly

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Environment variable not loading properly
integration_issues.details: Frontend restart resolved environment variable loading issue

working_features.status: ✅ Working - Proper styling, navigation, hero section
✅ Working - Filter dropdown functional, shows 'no results' appropriately

Browse stylists page loads without runtime errors
Registration forms display correctly with working Turnstile

critical_issues: Fix Turnstile verification in backend - test tokens should work for development
Investigate why Cloudflare test token '1x00000000000000000000AA' returns 400 Bad Request
suggestions: Consider adding a development mode bypass for Turnstile verification
Add proper error handling for Turnstile API failures

success_percentage.frontend: 90% - All pages loading properly, minor bugs fixed, Turnstile working
